title: New Lodestone Recipe
description: Changes Lodestone recipe to its new one in snapshot 25w02a
body:
## New Lodestone recipe in old versions 
This datapack adds the new lodestone recipe introduced in **Snapshot 25w02a (1.21.5)** to older versions of minecraft 


<details>
<summary>New Lodestone Crafting Recipe</summary>

![New Lodestone Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fe12a3fc9013420a6fba3cea001dd12214d3e1e.png)

</details>



### For obvious reasons this datapack **WON'T** work under version 1.16 of Minecraft

_**If you're using older versions of minecraft such as 1.16 or 1.17 you will see that the datapack says that its made for a newer version of minecraft. This does not matter and the datapack will work as regular**_


**If there are any bugs/feature requests please DM 4_Square on discord**
